question: The holographic principle in physics suggests
options: All information in a volume of space can be encoded on its boundary
Rhythmic electrical activity linked to cognition, memory and consciousness
That fundamental particles are actually one-dimensional vibrating strings of energy
Life may have originated elsewhere and been transported to Earth
answer: All information in a volume of space can be encoded on its boundary

question: Quantum error correction is necessary because
options: Qubits are extremely fragile and prone to decoherence
Multiple technologies merging into unified platforms or systems
In any isolated system, entropy can only increase over time
That fundamental particles are actually one-dimensional vibrating strings of energy
answer: Qubits are extremely fragile and prone to decoherence

question: The anthropic principle in cosmology states
options: Systems capable of performing a quintillion (10¹⁸) calculations per second
An AI system that can improve its own algorithms leading to rapid capability growth
The protein folding problem — predicting 3D protein structure from amino acid sequence
The universe's conditions allow for observers because we exist to observe it
answer: The universe's conditions allow for observers because we exist to observe it

answer: The protein folding problem — predicting 3D protein structure from amino acid sequence
